data.title: Tether mints 16 billion USDT on Tron in 2025
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Tether Ltd. has orchestrated a substantial expansion of its USDT supply on the Tron network, minting an additional 16 billion tokens in 2025. This strategic manoeuvre has propelled Tron’s total USDT supply to 75. 7 billion, establishing its dominance over Ethereum’s network
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tether-mints-16-billion-usdt-on-tron-in-2025/

data.title: White House Official Criticizes Effective Altruists' Approach to AI
data.description: According to Odaily, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and AI, expressed concerns on the X platform about the effective altruists' attempt to rebrand themselves following the SBF scandal. He noted that their efforts to position themselves as 'hawks' are undermined by their agenda to slow down technological progress, which could result in the United States falling behind in the global AI race.

data.title: Nasdaq notifies Canaan Technology that it must meet the minimum purchase price requirement within 180 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Canaan Technology received a written notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market on May 13, 2025, stating that the company did not comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550 (a) (2) because the closing price of its American depositary shares was less than US$1.00 per share for the past 30 consecutive business days. According to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810 (c) (3) (A), Canaan Technology is allowed to re-comply with the minimum purchase price requirement within the 180-calendar-day compliance period (i.e. before November 10, 2025), that is, the closing price of its American depositary receipts must reach or exceed US$1.00 per share for at least 10 consecutive business days within the 180-calendar-day compliance period. It is reported that Nasdaq's notification letter has no direct impact on the listing or trading of the company's securities on Nasdaq. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin Seoul 2025 to Host Global Crypto Leaders
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 15, 2025-Bitcoin Seoul 2025, billed as Asia’s largest Bitcoin-focused conference, will convene global crypto leaders, institutional investors, and policy experts in the South Korean capital from June 4 to 6. The event aims to cement Seoul’s position as a rising hub in the global Bitcoin economy. Hosted at Signiel Seoul and SKY31 […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/bitcoin-seoul-2025-to-host-global-crypto-leaders

data.title: Gate Alpha is now online REX(REX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate Alpha is now listed on REX (REX), and you can trade by entering the APP.
Gate Alpha now supports public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase on-chain assets without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: White House Crypto and AI Director: After the SBF Fraud, Effective Altruists Need to Reshape Their Image
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News David Sacks, the White House encryption and AI director, posted on the X platform that after the SBF run fraud scandal, effective altruists need to reshape their image, so they try to position themselves as "hawks", but their technology deceleration agenda is exactly the same, which will cause the United States to lose in the artificial intelligence competition.

data.title: Bo Hines backs GENIUS act to elevate US dollar via stablecoins in global finance
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Bo Hines, the executive director of Donald Trump’s Digital Asset Advisory Committee, heralded the transformative potential of the GENIUS Act, a legislative push to cement the US dollar’s global pre-eminence through stablecoins. Hines articulated a vision where these digital assets serve as the backbone for a revolutionised financial ecosystem, streamlining payment systems with [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bo-hines-backs-genius-act-to-elevate-us-dollar-via-stablecoins-in-global-finance/

data.title: A whale sells 5 million FARTCOIN at $1.18
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale sold 5 million FARTCOIN at a price of US$1.18 and obtained 5.92 million USDC.

data.description:
XRP’s $3 target depends on Bitcoin breaking its key supply barrier.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/xrp-faces-pressure-amid-bitcoin-liquidity-crunch-will-3-be-within-reach/

data.title: Bo Hines: GENIUS Act could strengthen stablecoin dominance over the dollar
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bo Hines, executive director of Trump's Digital Asset Advisory Committee, posted on the X platform that the GENIUS Act focuses on the role of stablecoins in strengthening the dominance of the US dollar. He believes that it will help modernize payment infrastructure and improve transfer efficiency and transparency. Digital asset technology is the core of the next generation of finance, and the United States is ready to lead the world in this field.

data.title: LBank has listed XBT (XBT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched XBT (XBT) at 12:30 (SGT) on May 17, and opened the XBT/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 13:00 on May 18.

data.title: DeFi Technologies financial report: holding about 208 BTC, 121 ETH and 14,375 SOL
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi Technologies announced its financial data for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, which disclosed that thanks to the rise in digital asset prices, the asset management scale of its digital asset ETP issuing company Valour has risen to 921 million Canadian dollars (about 640 million US dollars). In addition to the adjustment of altcoin holdings, the main digital asset holdings include: 
208.8 BTC (19,459,046 US dollars), 121 ETH (213,761 US dollars), 14,375 SOL (2,156,573 US dollars), 433.322 AVAX (9,701,160 US dollars), 1,642,703 CORE (1,199,885 US dollars). (PRNewswire)

data.title: Tether's USDT Issuance on Tron Surpasses Ethereum in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain monitoring service Lookonchain reports that in 2025, Tether minted 16 billion USDT on the Tron network. This issuance brings the total USDT supply on Tron to 75.7 billion, surpassing the amount issued on Ethereum.

data.title: Panama and El Salvador Explore Renewable Energy for Bitcoin Mining
data.description: According to Odaily, Mizrachi shared insights on social media platform X following discussions with El Salvador's Bitcoin advisor Max Keiser and Bitcoin Office head Stacy Herbert. The trio explored how Panama and El Salvador could leverage renewable energy to advance Bitcoin mining. Additionally, Panama City plans to incorporate El Salvador's financial literacy textbook, 'What is Money?', into its online library system.

data.title: Donald Trump’s Crypto Firm Invested $3M in EOS
data.description:
S. President Donald Trump, invested nearly $3 million in the token. The move brought renewed attention to EOS amid broader market consolidation, raising questions about the sustainability of the surge
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/donald-trumps-crypto-firm-invested-3m-in-eos/

data.title: Panama City Mayor Hints at Building Bitcoin Reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Mizrachi posted the information of "Bitcoin Reserve" on the social platform X after meeting with Max Keiser, a Bitcoin consultant in El Salvador, and Stacy Herbert, the head of the Bitcoin Office. It is reported that the three discussed how Panama and El Salvador can use renewable energy to promote the development of Bitcoin mining. In addition, Panama City will also include El Salvador's "What is Currency?" Financial Knowledge Textbook into its online library system. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Wave of cryptocurrency-related abductions prompts enhanced security measures in France
data.description:
17-5-2025 – France has unveiled comprehensive security protocols for cryptocurrency entrepreneurs and their families, following a disturbing surge in targeted kidnappings across the nation. Interior Minister Bruno Retailleau has orchestrated a robust response to what authorities believe may be interconnected criminal activities. The initiative encompasses priority access to emergency services, thorough premises security evaluations, [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/wave-of-cryptocurrency-related-abductions-prompts-enhanced-security-measures-in-france/
